evals.name: decrypt-file-stdout
evals.prompt: I have an encrypted file at /tmp/secrets.yaml.enc that was encrypted with KMS envelope encryption. Can you decrypt it and show me the contents?
evals.expected_output: Plaintext contents of /tmp/secrets.yaml.enc printed to stdout.

evals.name: decrypt-with-context
evals.prompt: This file /tmp/prod-secret.enc was encrypted for the production environment. I need to decrypt it. The encryption context was {"env":"production"}.
evals.expected_output: Plaintext printed to stdout. Encryption context passed to decrypt.

evals.name: decrypt-inline-string
evals.prompt:
I have this encrypted string from our CI pipeline: 'CiQAK2h...
MTIzND...
cGF5bG9...'. Can you decrypt it back to the original value?
evals.expected_output: Original plaintext recovered from the 3-line base64 input.
